meta.title: Holdfy – Protected Payments
meta.description: Holdfy protected payments: PIX with held funds (QR code) for buyers and sellers — no new app required.
meta.ogDescription: Protected payments with PIX. Holdfy holds funds until delivery is confirmed.

hero.subtitle: Your money stays held with the simplicity of PIX — on WhatsApp, Instagram, or your store. Buyers use the same PIX rail; you keep disputes and release under clear rules.
hero.chatCaption: Money held where people already chat
hero.chat1: Can I pay safely on WhatsApp?
hero.chat2: Yes. I sent your Holdfy link — pay with PIX; funds stay held until you confirm delivery.
hero.chat4: No. Same PIX you already use. The seller gets paid only after you confirm.

problem.title: Epidemic scams in informal commerce
problem.subtitle: Informal P2P keeps growing — with almost no structural protection outside closed marketplaces.
problem.card1Body: Buyers send PIX and depend entirely on the seller's goodwill.
problem.card2Body: Platforms warn about scams — few actually hold the money in these conversational flows.
problem.card3Body: Either you trust blindly or you lose the deal. A technical middle ground barely exists.
problem.card4Body: Instagram sellers do not get marketplace logistics — they need a lightweight security layer.
problem.stepsTitle: From chat to checkout — without protection
problem.step1Body: WhatsApp, Instagram, and independent shops drive huge informal volume — with little built-in protection.
problem.step2Body: Same PIX buyers already trust. Funds are held in Holdfy instead of going straight to the seller.
problem.step3Body: Release follows delivery confirmation, evidence, and dispute policy — not goodwill alone.
problem.step4Body: API, webhooks, and a guided WhatsApp flow reduce drop-off for informal sellers.

features.title: Plain PIX. Smart security.
features.subtitle: Buyers keep the rail they already use. You get programmable release, disputes, and integrations — without asking users to learn a new wallet.
features.f1Body: Buyers pay with PIX; funds stay held until release rules are met.
features.f2Body: Share checkout links in chat — same UX, funds held underneath.
features.f3Body: Transparent seller fee with optional yield tiers when it fits your segment.
features.f4Body: Tracking, photos, and human support when conversations break down.
features.f5Body: Guided messages reduce drop-off for informal sellers.
features.f6Body: Webhooks and dashboards so ops teams see status in real time.
features.disputeBody: Funds stay held while both sides submit evidence. Holdfy applies policy consistently — less "he said, she said" in DMs.
features.disputeChat1: It's been 10 days and the product still hasn't arrived. 😱
features.disputeChat2: I'm sorry to hear that! I'm opening a dispute for your order right now. 🔍
features.disputeChat3: Dispute #4821 opened. The seller has 48h to respond with proof of shipment.
features.disputeChat4: And my money? Is it safe?
features.disputeChat5: 100% safe. Your R$ 850,00 is still held in Holdfy — the seller cannot touch it. 🔒
features.disputeChat6: What happens if the seller doesn't respond?
features.disputeChat7: Dispute resolved in your favor! ✅ R$ 850,00 refunded to your PIX key in under 5 seconds.

benefits.title: Why teams pick Holdfy
benefits.subtitle: You are not replacing PIX — you are adding security, policy, and observability on top of Brazil's default rail.
benefits.b1: Polished UX: no "download another app" step to complete payment.
benefits.b2: Disputes with clear rules + evidence and human support when it matters.
benefits.b3: API + plugins + a conversational WhatsApp agent to scale informal channels.
benefits.b4: Optional DeFi Edition: 70 / 10 / 20 yield split when you want upside secured.
benefits.defiTitle: Money can earn while it stays held
benefits.defiBody: Offer a classic (no-yield) default and optional yield for merchants who want upside while funds are held — with a transparent 70 / 10 / 20 split.
benefits.uc1Body: Send a protected link after the deal is agreed — security without leaving the thread.
benefits.uc2Body: Stories and DMs convert better when checkout feels native and funds are held.
benefits.uc3Body: VTEX, Shopify, or custom checkout — webhooks keep your stack in sync.

cta.title: Ready in minutes
cta.description: Open Holdfy and run a PIX payment with held funds end to end — hold, release, and disputes without a new wallet for buyers.
cta.footnote: No new wallet for buyers — PIX in, hold, release.

footer.tagline: Holdfy holds your money on PIX — for WhatsApp, social, and your own storefront.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.hint: Check the URL or go back to the marketing home or sign in.

auth.resetDesc: We will email you a link to choose a new password.
auth.supportDesc: Email <1>support@holdfy.com</1> or call +1 (555) 010-4200 on business days, 9am–6pm UTC.
auth.signUpDesc: Start with a buyer wallet. You can switch roles after login.
auth.toastResetSent: If an account exists, you will receive reset instructions.
auth.toastBiometric: Biometric sign-in would open your device prompt here.

buyer.protectedDesc: Buyers pay with a standard PIX (QR code or copy-and-paste). Holdfy holds the amount until delivery is confirmed — no new app required.

seller.respondDesc: Explain your side and attach proof of shipment if available.

order.paidPix: Paid with PIX · released after delivery is confirmed
order.stepCustodyDesc: Funds held by Holdfy until release
order.disputeDesc: Tell us what went wrong. Funds stay held while we review.
order.toastDisputeSent: Your dispute was submitted. Our team will follow up.

payment.title: Add funds via PIX
payment.helpDesc: Scan the QR code or copy the PIX string in your banking app. Funds appear held within seconds.

transactionComplete.title: Transaction complete
transactionComplete.subtitle: Your payment is held until delivery is confirmed.

wallet.depositDesc: Add BRL to your protected balance using PIX.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.n1Body: R$ 8.500,00 for order #8921 is held until delivery.
notifications.n2Body: Courier picked up your package — track in Orders.

withdraw.title: Withdraw funds
withdraw.toastInvalid: Enter a valid amount and PIX key.
